channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran’s IRGC backs Mojtaba Khamenei as new supreme leader
item.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has pledged allegiance to Mojtaba Khamenei, the country's new supreme leader.

item.title: Oil soars past $100 a barrel, stocks plunge as US-Israel war on Iran rages
item.description: Crude oil prices surge more than 20 percent as sprawling regional conflict threatens global energy supplies.

item.title: Iran war live: Mojtaba Khamenei named supreme leader; Israel bombs Tehran
item.description: Iran's military and political leaders pledge allegiance to Mojtaba Khamenei as US-Israeli attacks continue.

item.title: Iran names Ayatollah Khamenei’s son as new leader after father’s killing
item.description: Iranian state television has announced that the Assembly of Experts has chosen Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader.

item.title: Who’s in control in Iran and how will Gulf states react to attacks?
item.description: An apology comes from Iran's president, yet missiles are still hitting neighbours.

item.title: Palestinians killed during Israeli settler attack in the occupied West Bank
item.description: Palestinians were killed after armed Israeli settlers attacked the village of Abu Falah in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Iran names Khamenei’s son as new supreme leader after father’s killing
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei will now be charged with leading Islamic Republic through the biggest crisis in its 47-year history.

item.title: Marches for International Women’s Day denounce war, abuse and oppression
item.description: Marches on 115th anniversary of IWD place focus on issues like US-Israeli war on Iran and Trump's links with Epstein.

item.title: Aftermath in Iran of US and Israeli air strikes
item.description: The US and Israel continue to strike Iran, hitting oil storage depots and refining facilities in Tehran.

item.title: How do you track a war in real time?
item.description: US and Israel attack Iran: Information is power, and now everyone has it.
